Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael Pecherer, 925.386.0943 Referee.
No other appearances.

Discussed. Mr. Pecherer addresses the proof of service issue. Mr. Pecherer states he will file a corrected proof of service.

Mr. Pecherer ask the Court to grant ond of the following: 1) to allow the use of the Defendant's money to store the Defendant's own property in a storage unit or 2) allow the referee to hire an Estate Liquidator to the estate.

The Court rules as follows: Order To Show Cause To Defendant Steven Chiapelone is Taken Under Submission. Proposed orders submitted. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Order To Show Cause To Defendant Steven Chiapelone
Off Calendar Aug-23-2019 Continued To Sep-20-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
OTHER (referee) Michael Pecherer (925-518-7076).
No other appearances.

The court noted proof of service is needed. ARGUED: Mr. Pecherer stated defendant evades service, believes defendant checks the court's docket and moves out of state for periods of time, that he has limited options with the house full of low value items, few high value items can go into storage which can then be auction off, and he will make best efforts to sell items and the money will be in his trust account. Mr. Pecherer requests 30 day continuance. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause To Defendant Steven Chiapelone is continued to September 20, 2019 at 9:30amm in dept 501 for proof of service.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
